import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import Navbar from "../components/Navbar"; import { api } from "../lib/api"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; const projectPlaceholders = [ "ai research lab", "cyber range", "open hardware", ]; export default function Landing() { const [stats, setStats] = useState({ projects: 0, members: 0 }); useEffect(() => { (async () => { try { const [p] = await Promise.allSettled([ api.get("/projects"), ]); if (p.status === "fulfilled") setStats((s) => ({ ...s, projects: p.value.data.length })); } catch {} })(); }, []); return (

coming next

future projects

view projects
{projectPlaceholders.map((project) => (

planned track

{project}

member projects will appear here as the forge starts shipping.

))}
); }
